attacking_style: Survives from breakaways rather than initiating late attacks; demonstrates ability to recover from adversity and win on steep gradient finishes (13% conquered). Wins through resilience rather than single decisive accelerations.
team_tactics: Insufficient data to establish team tactical patterns from single race observation.
terrain_preference: Excels on steep gradient finishes (13% handled successfully). Demonstrates climbing ability sufficient to survive attritional breakaways over extended final climbs (30km+).
vulnerability: Can be ejected on sustained climbs (dropped at 25km to go), suggesting vulnerability to sustained high-pace climbing despite recovery abilities.
key_patterns: Shows exceptional mental and physical resilience, recovering from being dropped to win.
Wins sprints on extreme gradients (13%), suggesting power maintenance on steep finishes.
Operates effectively in breakaway scenarios with multiple late-race attacks and attrition.
form_trajectory: unknown: single observation shows strong performance with exceptional recovery, but insufficient data to establish trajectory trend
